zh.lifeSummary: 當Honor Wallis於大約1662年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆波斯姆斯時，她的父親George Wallis44歲，母親Eleanor Ann Wallis38歲。她於1682年與James Allard Sr在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆也格斯波特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1722年6月19日在美國新罕布夏州享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Honor Wallis于大约1662年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆波斯姆斯时，她的父亲George Wallis44岁，母亲Eleanor Ann Wallis38岁。她于1682年与James Allard Sr在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆也格斯波特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1722年6月19日在美国新罕布什尔州享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wallis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English: from Anglo-Norman French Waleis, Walais ‘Welshman’, also sometimes ‘Breton’ (from Old English wēalas, walas, plural of walh, wealh, originally meaning a ‘Roman citizen’ and referring to the native British population, but in Old English this term later came to mean ‘serf, unfree person, foreigner’ or ‘Welshman’). In western and central England the medieval reference is clearly to Welshmen. In Norfolk and Lincolnshire, the reference was probably to Bretons, many of whom settled in the eastern counties after the Conquest. Compare Welsh , Walsh . The idea that the Scottish surname refers to the Welsh-speaking Britons of Strathclyde is erroneous.

variants.name: Wallace
meanings: Scottish and English: variant of   Wallis  , especially in Scotland, where the name was introduced from the Welsh Marches by a family of tenants of the Stewarts in the 12th century.
Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish (Ashkenazic) surnames, e.g.   Wallach  .

variants.name: Wales
meanings: habitational name from Wales near Sheffield (South Yorkshire). The placename means ‘The Welshmen’ and denoted a settlement of Brittonic speakers living on the boundary between the Anglo-Saxon kingdoms of Northumbria and Mercia (from Old English wēalas, walas, plural of walh, wealh, originally meaning ‘Roman citizen’ and referring to the native British population, but in Old English this term later came to mean ‘serf, unfree person, foreigner’ or ‘Welshman’). See also Wallis .
habitational name from Wales, the country named from Old English wēalas ‘foreigners’ (especially those speaking Celtic or Romance languages). This meaning of the surname is quite rare.

variants.name: Welsh
meanings: Scottish, English, and Irish: ethnic name from Middle English welshe (Old English wēalisc, wēlisc) ‘foreign, Welsh’, for someone from Wales or a speaker of the Welsh language. Compare Walsh and Wallace .
Americanized form of Ukrainian and Jewish (from Ukraine) Voloshin or its Polish variant Wołoszyn (see Woloszyn ).

nameMeanings.name: Honor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Honour ;  the dominant spelling of both the vocabulary word and the given name in the United States today. This is now the more frequent spelling of the name in Britain also, used, for example, for the actress  Honor Blackman  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Honour
meanings: From the vocabulary word denoting the quality (via Old French, from Latin honor). The name was popular with the Puritans in the 17th century and has remained in modest use to the present day.

en.lifeSummary: When Honor Wallis was born about 1662, in Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, her father, George Wallis, was 44 and her mother, Eleanor Ann Wallis, was 38. She married James Allard Sr in 1682, in Gosport, Rye, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 19 June 1722, in New Hampshire, United States, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Honor Wallis est née environ 1662, à Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, George Wallis, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Ann Wallis, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé James Allard Sr en 1682, à Gosport, Rye, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 19 juin 1722, à New Hampshire, États-Unis, à l’âge de 61 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Honor Wallis è nata il circa 1662 nel Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, sua padre, George Wallis, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Eleanor Ann Wallis, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato James Allard Sr nel 1682, nel Gosport, Rye, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 19 giugno 1722, nel New Hampshire, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Honor Wallisが約1662年にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアロクインガムポルトスモウスで生まれた時，父George Wallisは44歳，母Eleanor Ann Wallisは38歳であった。1682年にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアロクインガムリゴスプオルトでJames Allard Srと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1722年6月19日にアメリカ合衆国ニューハンプシャー州で61歳で死去した。

ko.Gosport, Rye, Rockingham, New Hampshire,: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 록잉함 리 고스포트
ko.lifeSummary: Honor Wallis(이)가 대략 1662년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 록잉함 포츠모우스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 George Wallis(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor Ann Wallis(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1682년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 록잉함 리 고스포트에서 James Allard Sr(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1722년 6월 19일 미국 뉴햄프셔 주에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Honor Wallis nasceu aproximadamente 1662, em Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, seu pai, George Wallis, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Ann Wallis, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com James Allard Sr em 1682, em Gosport, Rye, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 19 de junho de 1722, em Nova Hampshire, Estados Unidos da América, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Honor Wallis родилась около 1662 г. в местности порцмоут, роккингхам, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени George Wallis было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Ann Wallis, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени James Allard Sr в 1682 г. в местности госпорт, ри, роккингхам, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 19 июня 1722 г. в местности Нью-Гэмпшир, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Honor Wallis nació aproximadamente 1662, en Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, su papá, George Wallis, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Eleanor Ann Wallis, tenía 38 años. Se casó con James Allard Sr en 1682, en Gosport, Rye, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 19 de junio de 1722, en Nuevo Hampshire, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 61 años.
